message:
feat(conformance): integrate fnp-linalg with differential, metamorphic, and adversarial test cases

Add linear algebra testing infrastructure to the conformance suite:

- Add fnp-linalg dependency to fnp-conformance Cargo.toml
- Import linalg validation functions (solve_2x2, qr/svd/lstsq output shapes,
  backend bridge, tolerance/spectral/policy validators)
- Define LinalgDifferentialCase struct for differential testing across QR, SVD,
  least squares, and matrix solve operations
- Define LinalgMetamorphicCase struct for relation-based testing invariants
- Define LinalgAdversarialCase struct for error path and boundary validation
- Add LinalgDifferentialMismatch and LinalgDifferentialReportArtifact for
  structured test result reporting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
